svg.text: updatePersonal · updateEmergencyContact · add/update/removeAllergy · add/update/removeMedication · add/update/removeVaccination · add/update/removeProcedure · updateInsurance* · addShareToken · revokeShareToken · appendLog · clearAll
DATA LAYER (src/core/) — Layer 0 · COMPLETE · do not modify
smoke — all page modules export a default function
component tests needed when each component is built
MedicationList.tsx → wire into MedicationsPage → add tests
closest pattern to AllergyList · add/edit/delete + status select + source field
VaccinationList.tsx → wire into VaccinationsPage → add tests
same pattern · vaccine name, date, lot, site, source
ProcedureList.tsx → wire into ProceduresPage → add tests
same pattern · category select + notes textarea
InsurancePrimaryForm + InsuranceSecondaryForm → wire into InsurancePage → add tests
form pattern like PersonalDetailsForm · secondary is optional/toggleable
OverviewPage — read-only summary cards for all sections
build last, once all data sections exist · no store writes
Layer 2 · deferred · requires QR / link / clipboard / print sharing flow
src/core/ — Layer 0 COMPLETE — do not modify types.ts, schema.ts, storage.ts, or store.ts without discussion
